data.raceComments: {"comment":"The betting will be key with the McEvoy-trained 4. SUNLIT SERENADE, who resumes off a Group 2 at Mooney Valley. Before that she had been beaten just 2L over this trip at Sandown-Hillside first-up and then won her Maiden comfortably at Seymour when heavily bet. Maps for a soft run and Coffey sticks off a strong Flemington jumpout. 8. SILVER TOP RIDGE disappointed at Yarra Valley (vet cleared). Her form prior stacks right up including a 1.3L defeat here over 1200m at 66 level. Has been kept on the fresh side and deserves another chance. 2. LIL ORLOV led over 1200m at Cranbourne first-up, and the fitness gave out late. Had presented off two trial wins and was a big 1400m Maiden winner at Wangaratta last time he raced. Uses the low gate and has to be considered. 2. LIL ORLOV won his Maiden easily on debut and then wasn't beaten far over 1200m in a 62 at Sale. Better suited and will position forward from an insider gate. Has plenty of scope for improvement.","runners":[4,8,2,2],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: ECHUCA-R6-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
